---
title: "Bónusdeild karla"
subtitle: "Körfubolti"
description: "Spár fyrir Bónusdeild karla í körfubolta"
date: last-modified
---

## Spár fyrir næstu umferð

![](figures/next_round_predictions.png){.prediction-image}

## Staðan

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
![](figures/group_table.png){.table-image}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![](figures/deild_points.png){.chart-image}
:::

:::

## Styrkur liða

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](figures/styrkur.png){.strength-image}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](figures/strengths_table.png){.table-image}
:::

:::

## Líkur á deildarsigri

![](figures/deild_top.png){.prediction-image}

## Heimavöllur

![](figures/home_advantage.png){.chart-image}

---

[← Körfubolti](../index.qmd) | [Um spálíkönin](../../um-spalikon/index.qmd)
